The '''Mandalorian Guard Captain''' was a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] of [[clan Ordo]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] could be found guarding the entrance to the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Neo-Crusader]] [[Mandalorian Outpost (Dxun)|compound]] on [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]]. When [[Meetra Surik]] was trying to get transport to [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] from [[Canderous Ordo|Mandalore the Preserver]], she had to gain his trust by completing a series of quests. The Mandalorian [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] offered Surik one of these quests, which was to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the great [[Zakkeg/Legends|Zakkeg]] and bring its [[Ear/Legends|ear]] back to him as proof.

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', if the player character has received the quest from the Mandalorian Captain about killing the Zakkeg, and if he or she has beaten [[Davrel]] in the Mandalorian [[Battle Circle]], Davrel will try to regain his honor by attempting to kill Surik. The player can persuade Davrel to help kill the Zakkeg.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
